title: Saddle & Horse Armor Craft
description: This mod adds the craft for the Saddle Item and Horse armor (Diamond,Iron,Gold)
body:
**📘 What Does Our Mod Add:**

 This mod adds the craft for the Saddle Item and the _Original_ craft for the Horse armor Item
 which was briefly in the game in a 1.6.1 Snapshot (13w16a)


**😀What differences our mod from the others:**

Our mods are very Vanilla friendly, Because they dont add extremely OP Items that ruins the fun!
